title: write_verilog: inline internal cells that are used exactly once

features.name: unary plus with double signed cast in expression
features.description: Code should include a $signed expression with nested unary operators like + $signed(- value) that would benefit from single-use inlining

features.name: concatenation assignment on left-hand side
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment on the LHS where the concatenated result comes from a single-use wire, benefiting from inlining

features.name: casez with equality comparisons as selectors
features.description: Code should include a casez statement with multiple equality comparisons as selector expressions that can be inlined

features.name: single use wire assignments with operators
features.description: Code should include wire assignments where an intermediate wire is driven by a single cell and consumed exactly once by another expression, eligible for inlining
